sprint: My Cloud Worlds — Card Layout Fix
task: A real, user-supplied screenshot of the just-shipped My Cloud Worlds feature showed every card's World Name crushed to 1-2 characters, overlapping the action button. Two compounding CSS bugs fixed: (1) .wb-cloud-world-card inherited the 112px right padding .wb-project-card reserves for My World Projects' own absolutely-positioned Rename/Duplicate/Delete controls -- a Cloud World card has none, so that padding sat empty, wasting space; fixed with the same padding-right:18px override .wb-project-card-repo-only already uses. (2) The card's own action is a real text label, not a single glyph, so it can't share one inline row with a long name without crushing it; fixed by restructuring _cloudWorldCard() into a two-row stack (thumb+info on top, the action button full-width beneath). Verified via direct Playwright measurement: before, the name rendered at 64.6px wide (crushed); after, 224px wide (full name, no crushing), zero overlap with the button. Both goldenBuild.js suites and all three existing verification suites for this feature pass unchanged. Confined to tools/world-builder-v2/css/world-builder.css and tools/world-builder-v2/js/worldBuilderApp.js.
